Icon Missing Accessible Name Test Page

These icon elements match icon class patterns (fa-, icon-, bi-, etc.) but are not hidden with aria-hidden="true" and have no aria-label or text content.

Navigation home icon — no aria-hidden, no label
Email icon — no aria-hidden, no label
Phone icon — no aria-hidden, no label
Search icon span — matches icon- pattern
Bootstrap Icon star — matches bi- pattern

Back to index
